records.plan: web_search로 Anthropic의 공식 MCP 저장소와 프로토콜의 정의 및 목적을 찾습니다.

arguments.query: Anthropic Model Context Protocol MCP official repository github

results.title: Model Context Protocol · GitHub
results.snippet: This repository provides a multi-language reference implementation of the proposed interceptor extension for the Model Context Protocol (MCP), as described in SEP-1763.

results.title: Introducing the Model Context Protocol \ Anthropic
results.snippet: Nov 25, 2024 · To help developers start exploring, we’re sharing pre-built MCP servers for popular enterprise systems like Google Drive, Slack, GitHub, Git, Postgres, and Puppeteer.

results.title: Model Context Protocol servers - GitHub
results.snippet: Jan 25, 2026 · This repository is a collection of reference implementations for the Model Context Protocol (MCP), as well as references to community-built servers and additional resources. If you are …

results.title: Specification and documentation for the Model Context Protocol - GitHub
results.snippet: The official MCP documentation is built using Mintlify and available at modelcontextprotocol.io. The Model Context Protocol was created by David Soria Parra (@dsp) and Justin Spahr-Summers …

results.title: Releases · modelcontextprotocol/modelcontextprotocol - GitHub
results.snippet: Nov 25, 2025 · This release marks the stable release of the 2025-11-25 revision of the Model Context Protocol. The specification is available on the official Model Context Protocol website. For a detailed …

records.answer:
Anthropic Model Context Protocol (MCP) 공식 리소스를 찾았습니다:

• 공식 GitHub 조직: https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol
• Anthropic 공식 발표: https://www.anthropic.com/news/model-context-protocol (2024년 11월 25일)
• MCP 서버 구현 저장소: https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers (2026년 1월 25일 업데이트)
• 공식 명세 및 문서: https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/modelcontextprotocol (modelcontextprotocol.io)
• 릴리스 페이지: https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/modelcontextprotocol/releases (2025년 11월 25일)

MCP는 Google Drive, Slack, GitHub, Git, Postgres, Puppeteer 등 엔터프라이즈 시스템을 위한 미리 빌드된 서버들을 제공합니다.

```json
{"answer": "Anthropic Model Context Protocol (MCP) 공식 리소스를 찾았습니다:

• 공식 GitHub 조직: https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol
• Anthropic 공식 발표: https://www.anthropic.com/news/model-context-protocol (2024년 11월 25일)
• MCP 서버 구현 저장소: https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers (2026년 1월 25일 업데이트)
• 공식 명세 및 문서: https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/modelcontextprotocol (modelcontextprotocol.io)
• 릴리스 페이지: https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/modelcontextprotocol/releases (2025년 11월 25일)

MCP는 Google Drive, Slack, GitHub, Git, Postgres, Puppeteer 등 엔터프라이즈 시스템을 위한 미리 빌드된 서버들을 제공합니다."}
```

  - https://chnbeta.oversea.cnki.net/index/
